title: Program Recommendation Engine
description: Sistem, user'ın fitness goals ve level'ine göre uygun coach'ları ve program template'lerini recommend eder.
acceptance_criteria: User fitness profile'ına göre recommended coaches gösterilir
Recommendation algorithm: Specialization match, Fitness Level match, Rating
Recommended coaches 'Find Coach' sayfasında prominent gösterilir
Coach'ın success rate gösterilir (program completion stats based on similar goals)
business_rules: Recommendation sadece fitness profile complete old'uktan sonra gösterilir
Algorithm confidential ve modüler (easy to update)
